config._comment_strategy: NODE_UPSERT is idempotent by node_id. NODE_DELETE removes the node and all incident relationships. The query accepts only the shared Task 2/3 contract.
config.neo4j.cypher.topic.cpg.nodes: CALL { WITH event WITH event WHERE event.event_type = 'NODE_DELETE' OPTIONAL MATCH (n:CPGNode {node_id: event.node_id}) DETACH DELETE n RETURN 0 AS action UNION WITH event WITH event WHERE event.event_type = 'NODE_UPSERT' MERGE (n:CPGNode {node_id: event.node_id}) SET n.file_id = event.file_id, n.path = event.path, n.content_sha256 = event.content_sha256, n.structural_path = event.structural_path, n.node_type = event.node_type, n.label = event.label, n.code = event.code, n.lineno = event.lineno, n.col_offset = event.col_offset, n.end_lineno = event.end_lineno, n.end_col_offset = event.end_col_offset, n.schema_version = event.schema_version, n.event_time = event.event_time, n.properties_json = apoc.convert.toJson(event.properties) RETURN 1 AS action } RETURN action
